theme_archetype: Swiss Brutalist / High-Contrast Minimalist (Archetype 4) modified with Light Theme and Neon Accents

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid protocol: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 or gap-8

navigation.cta_button: bg-[#161617] text-white hover:bg-[#2d2d2d] transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium

buttons.primary: bg-[rgb(0,255,102)] text-[#161617] hover:bg-[#00e55b] font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#161617] text-[#e2e2e4] hover:bg-[#2d2d2d] font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border border-[#161617] text-[#161617] hover:bg-[#161617] hover:text-[#e2e2e4] font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2

inputs.style: w-full bg-transparent border-b-2 border-[#C4C4CC] focus:border-[rgb(0,255,102)] py-3 outline-none transition-colors text-[#161617] placeholder:text-[#555555]

hero_3d.description: Abstract 3D circular object, use with mix-blend-multiply or CSS filter to tint it subtly with the neon green/blue brand colors in the hero section.

project_1.description: Dark code editor screen for development project case study.

project_2.description: Minimalist tech setup for AI/Automation case study.

about_team.description: Team working collaboratively on laptops, minimal modern office.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width=1.5 for a cleaner, modern look. Size typically w-5 h-5 for buttons, w-8 h-8 for section features.

Home.layout: Hero section. Massive impact H1: 'Criando soluções que conectam.' Centered or asymmetrical layout with the hero_3d image floating. Subtitle about intelligent development. Social/Github links. CTA button.

Work.layout: Bento Grid of project cards (use mocked data: Web App, Mobile App, AI Integration). Include image thumbnails (project_1, project_2). Tags for tech stack (React, Node, Python, etc.). Hover states are crucial.

Topics (Serviços).layout: Grid or list of categories: Desenvolvimento Web, Mobile, IA, Automação. Minimalist presentation, perhaps with Lucide icons.

About.layout: Editorial layout. 'Olá, nós somos a To,Do.' using Figtree. Text blocks for history, tech stack, team. Incorporate the about_team image in a portrait-style card with a subtle decorative toast/badge 'PORTRAIT 2025' or 'To,Do 2025'. Include decorative font 'Nanum Pen Script' for a handwritten touch.

Contact.layout: Clean, minimalist form. Inputs for Name, Email, Project Details. Submit button using primary green accent. Note: The backend will save this to MongoDB.

Footer.layout: Detailed footer, dark text on the secondary background (#C4C4CC). Copyright, social links, contact email.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette. DO NOT use generic white (#ffffff) or black (#000000) for backgrounds/text; stick to the provided #e2e2e4, #C4C4CC, #161617.
Import and apply fonts correctly via Google Fonts in index.css (Figtree, Inter, JetBrains Mono, Nanum Pen Script).
Use Framer Motion to add subtle enter animations (fade-up) and micro-interactions on cards (hover:scale).
Replace 'Subscribe' with 'Fale conosco' in the navbar CTA as requested.
For the Contact Form, set up a basic functional structure that sends data to an API route (to be implemented with MongoDB).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn Card components if they feel too 'boxy' or standard; customize them to fit the flat, soft-bordered Bento grid style described.
All text must be in Portuguese (Brazil).
